title: Verviers, Liège — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Verviers, Liège: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Verviers is a city in Liège with a population of 55,000. A historic wool-processing center in the Vesdre valley, with beautiful 18th-century architecture and easy access to the High Fens nature reserve.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
